svg.text: optional user-provided inputs (bypass pipeline when present)

g.title: --base-vectors: Source vector data. Can be fvec/mvec (native), npy dir (foreign), or parquet. When native xvec: identity (symlink), no conversion step. When foreign: convert step runs to produce all_vectors.mvec.
--query-vectors: Separate query vector file. When provided: no shuffle or extraction needed — queries used directly. When absent + self-search: queries extracted from base via shuffle.
--ground-truth: Pre-computed KNN ground truth indices. When provided: compute-knn step is elided (identity). verify-knn still runs to validate the provided GT.
--ground-truth-distances: Pre-computed KNN distances. Paired with GT indices. When provided: distances artifact is identity.
--metadata: Metadata source for predicate-filtered search. When slab: identity (no conversion). When parquet/dir: convert step produces metadata_all.slab.
User-provided predicates slab. When provided: generate-predicates step is elided. Rare — usually predicates are synthesized from the metadata survey.
User-provided predicate evaluation results. When provided: evaluate-predicates step is elided. Rare — usually computed by the pipeline.
User-provided filtered KNN ground truth. When provided: compute-filtered-knn step is elided. Rare — usually computed by the pipeline.
transform convert: Convert source vectors (npy, parquet, dir) to native xvec format. Active when source is not already a native xvec file. Identity (symlink) when source is native fvec/mvec.
transform convert: Convert metadata from parquet/dir to slab format. Active when source is not already a native .slab file. Identity (symlink) when source is native slab.
state set: Count records in all_vectors (or combined B+Q) and store as ${vector_count}. Always active when B facet is required.
analyze survey: Sample metadata to discover schema and value ranges. Produces metadata_survey.json used by predicate generation. Always active when M facet is required.

prepare-vectors: External merge-sort with in-segment dedup detection, L2 normalization (f64), near-zero detection (L2 < 1e-6), and normalization quality measurement. See SRD §20.3. Produces: sorted_ordinals.ivec, dedup_duplicates.ivec, zero_ordinals.ivec, sorted+normalized run files, and norm statistics (is_normalized, mean_epsilon). All cleaning happens in one pass while data is cache-hot.
generate predicates: Synthesize test predicates from metadata survey. Produces predicates.slab with configurable count and selectivity. Always active when M facet is required.

generate shuffle: Fisher-Yates permutation over clean ordinals (sorted ordinals minus duplicates minus zeros). Deterministic given seed. Used by vector and metadata extraction. Elided when HDF5 with separate query (no self-search).

transform extract: Reorder metadata records to match shuffled base vectors. Uses same shuffle as vector extraction for ordinal congruency. Elided when not self-search (metadata already ordinal-aligned).
compute evaluate-predicates: Evaluate each predicate against metadata records. Per-profile: range [0, base_count) matches the profile's base vector window. Always active when M facet is required.

transform extract: Extract base vectors from sorted+normalized data, eliding excluded ordinals (duplicates + zeros). See SRD §20.5. Contiguous-run memcpy between exclusion holes — no per-vector compute. Self-search: uses shuffle remainder. Separate query: full clean set.
transform extract: Extract query vectors from shuffle. First query_count shuffled ordinals, eliding excluded. Elided when HDF5 with separate query file.
state set: Count records in base_vectors and store as ${base_count}. Verifiable: vector_count - duplicate_count - zero_count = base_count.
compute knn: Brute-force exact K-nearest-neighbor computation. Per-profile: uses base_vectors[0..base_count) as corpus. Produces neighbor_indices.ivec and neighbor_distances.fvec.
compute filtered-knn: KNN with predicate pre-filtering. Per-profile: evaluates predicates to get eligible base vectors, then computes KNN among eligible only.
verify knn: Sparse-sample brute-force recomputation. Per-profile: samples queries, recomputes KNN, compares to stored GT.
verify predicate-results: SQLite-backed predicate verification. Per-profile: compares pre-computed metadata_indices to SQL evaluation.
Total records in source (or combined B+Q). Used as shuffle interval when no cleaning is active.
Number of duplicate vectors found during sort. Recorded in variables.yaml for provenance.
Number of near-zero vectors detected (L2 < 1e-6) during prepare-vectors. Recorded in variables.yaml for provenance.
Whether vectors pass normalization quality check. Set to true by extract-base after L2-normalization during extraction. All extracted vectors are normalized by construction.
Records in the extracted base_vectors file. base_count = vector_count - duplicate_count - zero_count (- query_count if self-search). Used by compute-knn as the search window size.
All imported vectors in native xvec format. Located at ${cache}/all_vectors.{ext}. May include combined B+Q for Strategy 1.
Sorted, L2-normalized, dedup-detected, zero-detected run files. Located in ${cache}/dedup_runs/. Also produces: sorted_ordinals.ivec, dedup_duplicates.ivec, zero_ordinals.ivec. See SRD §20.3.
PRNG permutation of clean ordinals (= sorted minus dups minus zeros). Located at ${cache}/shuffle.ivec. Deterministic given seed. Used by vector and metadata extraction.
All imported metadata as MNode slab records. Located at ${cache}/metadata_all.slab.
Schema and value range survey of the metadata. Located at ${cache}/metadata_survey.json. Used by generate-predicates for selectivity targeting.
B: The corpus vectors to search. Located at profiles/base/base_vectors.{ext}. Format matches the source (fvec for f32, mvec for f16). Record count = clean_count - query_count (or capped by base_end).
Q: The query vectors to run against the corpus. Located at profiles/base/query_vectors.{ext}. Either extracted from base via shuffle (self-search) or provided directly. Record count = query_count.

G: Ground-truth KNN indices. Per-profile at profiles/{profile}/neighbor_indices.ivec. Dimension = neighbors (e.g., 100). Each record lists the K nearest base vector ordinals for one query. Either computed by brute-force KNN or provided by user.

D: Ground-truth KNN distances. Per-profile at profiles/{profile}/neighbor_distances.fvec. Paired with neighbor_indices — same shape (query_count x neighbors). Each value is the distance from the query to the corresponding neighbor.

M: Metadata records, ordinal-aligned with base vectors. At profiles/base/metadata_content.slab. Each record is an MNode (structured key-value metadata for one base vector). Ordinal congruency: record N corresponds to base_vectors record N.
P: Test predicates for filtered search. At profiles/base/predicates.slab. Each record is a PNode (predicate tree) synthesized from the metadata survey. Configurable count and selectivity.

R: Predicate evaluation results. Per-profile at profiles/{profile}/metadata_indices.slab. For each predicate, stores the set of base vector ordinals that match. Used by compute-filtered-knn as the pre-filter.

F: Filtered KNN results. Per-profile at profiles/{profile}/filtered_neighbor_{indices,distances}. Same shape as G/D but computed with predicate pre-filtering. Each query uses only base vectors that match its predicate.

svg.text: ⤷ deferred profile expansion: per-profile [pp] steps instantiated after base_count is known

Note: profiles expand after base_count is known — see §3.13 Stratification Invariant
